name: Alibaba Cloud DMS MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Alibaba Cloud Data Management Service (DMS) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Alibaba Cloud DMS — querying and managing databases via DMS, executing SQL statements, managing data access governance, and integrating Alibaba Cloud's database management platform into agent-driven database administration and data analytics workflows.
use_cases: Executing SQL queries against Alibaba Cloud databases from analytics agents
Managing database access and governance workflows from DBA agents
Querying RDS, PolarDB, and other Alibaba Cloud databases from data agents
Monitoring database performance via DMS from observability agents
Executing data changes with DMS governance controls from compliance agents
Integrating database operations into Alibaba Cloud AI workflows
not_for: Non-Alibaba Cloud database users (AWS RDS, Azure SQL require different MCPs)
Teams without Alibaba Cloud DMS subscriptions
Uncontrolled direct database access (DMS provides governance layer)
best_when: An Alibaba Cloud user needs AI agents to query and manage databases through DMS's governance-controlled interface — with audit trails and access controls.
avoid_when: You don't use Alibaba Cloud, or need direct database access without DMS governance overhead.

auth.notes: Alibaba Cloud Access Key ID and Secret required. RAM (Resource Access Management) policy controls DMS permissions. Follow principle of least privilege for RAM users.

pricing.free_tier_limits: DMS: free tier with limited instances and users
pricing.paid_tiers: DMS Enterprise Edition: subscription-based; underlying cloud DB costs apply
pricing.notes: Alibaba Cloud account required. DMS has free and paid tiers. Official MCP server from aliyun organization.

performance.rate_limits: Alibaba Cloud API: rate limits per region and access level

known_agent_gotchas: DMS adds governance overhead — SQL execution goes through DMS audit and approval workflows
Alibaba Cloud RAM policy must grant DMS API access — not just database access
Chinese documentation primary — English docs may lag
DMS approval workflows may block agent writes — configure DMS permissions appropriately
Official from aliyun org — higher quality and stability than community MCPs
Data residency varies by Alibaba Cloud region — CN vs international regions differ
agent_readiness.security_notes: Alibaba Cloud Access Key auth. HTTPS enforced. Official aliyun MCP. DMS provides governance and audit trail. RAM least-privilege recommended. Access Key must be stored securely.

security_score_components.security_notes: Access Key auth. HTTPS. Official aliyun. RAM least-privilege. DMS governance layer adds security.
